See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 8810 => 'ico satellite', 8811 => 'ico satellite', 8812 => 'ellipso satellite', 8813 => 'ellipso satellite', 8816 => 'iridium satellite', 8817 => 'iridium satellite', 8818 => 'globalstar', 8819 => 'globalstar', ];
